content.json:
# ☁️ Cloud SOC Overview — Canada Region
**Project:** 06-cloud-soc-canada | **Region:** canadacentral / ca-central-1

Use the time range picker above to adjust the monitoring window.

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize
    TotalLogins = count(),
    FailedLogins = countif(ResultType != 0),
    SuccessRate = round(countif(ResultType == 0) * 100.0 / count(), 1)
| extend Label = "Sign-In Summary"
content.title: Azure AD Sign-In Summary

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize FailCount=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Failed Sign-Ins Over Time

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName has_any ("Add member to role","Remove member from role","Update role")
| extend Initiator=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), Role=tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| project TimeGenerated, Initiator, Role, OperationName, Result
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| limit 50
content.title: Recent Role Changes

content.query:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationNameValue has "delete" and ActivityStatusValue =~ "Success"
| summarize DeleteCount=count() by Caller, ResourceGroup
| where DeleteCount >= 1
| top 20 by DeleteCount desc
content.title: Top Resource Deletions by Caller

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize AlertCount=count() by AlertSeverity
| order by AlertCount desc
content.title: Security Alerts by Severity

content.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResultType == 0
| extend Country=tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
| where Country !in ("", "CA", "Canada")
| summarize ForeignLogins=count() by Country
| top 15 by ForeignLogins desc
content.title: Non-Canadian Sign-Ins (Top 15 Countries)
